task_completion.description: Verify that a list named 'Fall Survey 2024' was created in Garmin BaseCamp.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Fall Survey 2024' in the Library/Lists pane (usually on the left side) of the Garmin BaseCamp interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the waypoint 'Oak Stand A' was created with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a waypoint named 'Oak Stand A' in the list contents or map view. A waypoint properties dialog should show coordinates matching approximately 42.4505, -71.1085 (N 42.4505, W 71.1085).

task_completion.description: Verify that the waypoint 'Wetland Plot B' was created with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a waypoint named 'Wetland Plot B' in the list contents or map view. A waypoint properties dialog should show coordinates matching approximately 42.4512, -71.1062 (N 42.4512, W 71.1062).

task_completion.description: Verify that both waypoints are contained within the 'Fall Survey 2024' list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: With the 'Fall Survey 2024' list selected in the left pane, both 'Oak Stand A' and 'Wetland Plot B' should be visible in the data pane showing the contents of that specific list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the list was exported as a GPX file to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Export' or 'Save As' dialog box saving 'fall_survey_2024.gpx' to 'C:\workspace\output\', or a File Explorer window showing the 'fall_survey_2024.gpx' file successfully created in that folder.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Garmin BaseCamp GUI to create the list and waypoints.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with Garmin BaseCamp menus, map tools, and waypoint dialog boxes, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Garmin BaseCamp application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Garmin BaseCamp application window with its toolbars, map view, and library panes must be clearly visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the application's export functionality rather than manually writing a GPX file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the BaseCamp 'Export' dialog being used, ensuring the file wasn't just typed out in a text editor like Notepad or VS Code.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected list name is 'Fall Survey 2024'. It must contain exactly two waypoints: 'Oak Stand A' (Lat: 42.4505, Lon: -71.1085) and 'Wetland Plot B' (Lat: 42.4512, Lon: -71.1062). A coordinate tolerance of 0.005 degrees is acceptable. The final export must be a GPX file saved exactly to 'C:\workspace\output\fall_survey_2024.gpx'.
